rationale: No direct conflict. Educ. Code §29.045 governs approval of student applications for supplemental educational services accounts. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter any operative language or eligibility criteria in this section.
quote: Subject to available funding the agency shall approve each student who meets the program eligibility criteria established under Section 29.044 and assign to the student an account maintained under Section 29.042(b).
_note: Only indirect link is the 'subject to available funding' clause, which could be affected by reduced property tax revenue at the fiscal level, but this is not a direct statutory conflict.
